_doc: Exclusions documentees pour gosec. Ajoutees progressivement apres analyse.

_rules.G104: Audit errors not checked — intentional: fmt.Fprint*, close(), w.Write() in defer/HTTP handlers where return value is not actionable. Also excluded in .golangci.yml (errcheck).
_rules.G204: Audit use of dangerous function — exec.Command is required for launching AI CLIs (claude, codex, opencode). Inputs are validated via whitelist (AllowedCommands) before use.
_rules.G702: Audit integer overflow — acceptable in controlled contexts where input bounds are known (config parsing, protocol constants).
_rules.G704: Audit hardcoded credentials — excluded because the project uses .env files with placeholder values; no real credentials are hardcoded in source.
_rules.G101: Audit hardcoded credentials — same rationale as G704: placeholder values (PASTE_xxx_HERE) and credential-store sentinels (BMSECRET) are intentionally in source.
_rules.G115: Audit integer overflow conversion — acceptable in bounded contexts (math.Round, time conversions, size limits).
